text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Biwa Hayahide dominates the race<n>with a
stunning performance and<n>finishes ahead of Narita
Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Genuinely recognizing her strength,<n>Narita Taishin
puts Biwa Hayahide in<n>even greater spirits.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket is envious of the fun<n>race that
Narita Taishin and Biwa<n>Hayahide shared...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
But the Twinkle Series is not over yet,<n>and they'll
have as many chances as<n>they want to race
together again.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The BNW trio promises to once again<n>face off at
the autumn Tenno Sho.
